title: Eminence (Carrack-class)

The '''''Eminence''''' was an aging [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Eminence'' served as part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] that defended the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] during the final stages of its construction above the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], having learned of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] construction and [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] presence aboard the [[Battle station/Legends|station]], launched an [[Battle of Endor/Legends|assault]] on the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] with the intent of destroying it. During the battle, as the Imperial Navy clashed with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] in [[Space warfare/Legends|ship-to-ship combat]], the ''Eminence'' engaged the [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|gunship]] ''[[Braha'tok]]'', a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] less than one-third the ''Eminence''{{'s}} size. However, as the ''Eminence'' closed in on the ''Braha'tok'', the [[Gunship/Legends|gunship's]] sister ship, the ''[[Torktarak]]'', attacked the ''Eminence'' from behind, destroying the old Imperial vessel.

==Description==
The ''Eminence'' was an old [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="db" /> It was manufactured by the [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]]<ref name="Imperial Sourcebook" /> and was 350 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long.<ref name="CSWE" /> The ''Eminence'' was equipped with offensive weaponry capable of dealing serious damage to a [[Dornean/Legends|Dornean]] [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|''Braha'tok''-class gunship]].<ref name="db" />

==History==
[[File:CarrackCruiser-FF106.png|thumb|left|250px|A ''Carrack''-class light cruiser, the same class as the ''Eminence'']]
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during the height of the Galactic Civil War, the ''Eminence'' was stationed in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]] as part of the large Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]]<ref name="db" /> tasked with defending the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], an Imperial [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] under construction over the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who had purposely let [[Death Star II plans|knowledge]] of the second [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] fall into the Rebels' hands, made a visit to the incomplete superweapon with the intent of luring the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] into attacking the station. Upon exiting from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the Rebels would find themselves trapped between the Imperial Fleet and a fully-operational Death Star, from which the Emperor believed there would be no escape. The Rebels took the bait and arrived in the Endor [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

Mere moments after the Rebels arrived, the Imperial Fleet,<ref name="ROTJ" /> including the ''Eminence'',<ref name="db" /> emerged from the far side of Endor. During the ensuing [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle]], the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was destroyed by the Death Star's fully functional [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] in a move that stunned the Rebels.<ref name="ROTJ" /> As Alliance rescue craft attempted to pick up survivors from the ''Liberty''{{'s}} destruction, the ''Eminence'' moved in and attacked the rescue [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. The Rebel [[Dornean Navy|Dornean]] ''Braha'tok''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] ''[[Braha'tok]]'', a ship less than one-third the size of the ''Eminence'', was able to hold off the ''Eminence'' while the survivors were rescued, taking major damage in the process. With the ''Eminence'' focused on the ''Braha'tok'', the gunship's sister ship, the ''[[Torktarak]]'', attacked the ''Eminence'' from behind. The combined firepower from both Alliance gunships overwhelmed the ''Eminence'' and destroyed the aging Imperial vessel.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Eminence'' was created by "[[Ello137]]" in his winning entry for the ''Braha'tok''-class gunship in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature "[[What's The Story?]]," which allowed fans to provide backstories for certain aspects of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga. The information on the ''Eminence'' from Ello137's entry was later used in the entry on the ''Braha'tok''-class gunship in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]].

Originally, Ello137 intended the ''Eminence'' featured in his entry to be the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Eminence (Star Destroyer)|''Eminence'']], a craft identified in [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] as having fought at the [[Battle of ThonBoka]]. However, after submitting his entry, Ello137 discovered that the ''Eminence'' he intended to use was actually a Star Destroyer, not a ''Carrack''-class cruiser as he had identified it by. Ello137 attempted to resubmit his entry, this time using the ''Carrack''-class cruiser [[Integrity (Carrack-class)/Legends|''Integrity'']] from [[Matthew Stover]]'s [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. However, Ello137's first entry was chosen by StarWars.com, creating the ''Carrack''-class cruiser ''Eminence''.<ref name="blog">{{Blog|apocalypselater|16/comments|What's the Story, Ello137? Funny you should ask …}}</ref>
